title: Add News & Views category section to homepage bottom sections

requirements.summary: Add a 'News & Views' category section to the homepage bottom sections alongside the existing Startups & Funding, Interviews, and Market Trends sections, following the same layout and styling
acceptanceCriteria: The homepage displays four category sections at the bottom: Startups & Funding, News & Views, Interviews, and Market Trends.
The News & Views section renders published articles tagged with the 'News & Views' category.
The News & Views section includes a 'More' link that navigates to the News & Views category page.
The News & Views section matches the visual layout and styling of the other three category sections on the homepage.
If no published articles exist for News & Views, the section still appears with an appropriate empty or placeholder state consistent with the other sections.

file_operations.description: Add a fourth category section for 'News & Views' to the homepage bottom sections. Use the useArticlesByCategory query hook to fetch articles for Category.newsAndViews. Structure the section with a header row containing the category title and a 'More' link to '/category/news-and-views', followed by a grid of ArticleCard components in 'compact' variant. Place the News & Views section between the existing category sections, maintaining consistent spacing and layout. Ensure the section renders even when no articles are available, showing an appropriate empty state.
